buildCommand: node -e "import fs from 'fs'; import {execSync} from 'child_process'; const p='../../packages/brand/sync.mjs'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) execSync('node '+p,{stdio:'inherit'});" && npm run tokens && vite build

headers.value: X-CSRF-Token, X-Requested-With, Accept, Accept-Version, Content-Length, Content-MD5, Content-Type, Date, X-Api-Version

ignoreCommand: bash -c 'B=$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA; test -n "$B" && git cat-file -e "$B" 2>/dev/null && git diff --quiet "$B" HEAD -- . ../_landing && exit 0; exit 1'
